name: io.github.Alisammour/storyflo-mcp
description: Audio-news + Declassified MCP that pays your agent to integrate. Free, no-auth tools — narrate any article, browse the FBI/CIA/NSA/NASA Declassified library, plus market-linked story signal — start in seconds. Earn revenue share via register_embedder; premium briefings settle per-call over x402/USDC. 23 tools.
